steps.title: Follow the warning
steps.content: The passage says the novel has autobiographical parallels but is largely invented. Readers who ignore that fact and keep searching for real-life analogues risk treating fictional details as if they must correspond to Nguyen's actual life.

steps.title: Name the risk
steps.content: B reverses the warning because the readers are overemphasizing real-world links, not minimizing them. C introduces popularity, and D introduces influence from earlier writers. The risk is proposing biographical connections that the text says may not be supportable. The answer is A.
